title: Daddy Long Legs – Young Children (Ages 6–8)

hunks.text: A daddy long legs is a tiny animal with eight very long LEGS. Its body is very small and round. The LEGS are super thin and very, very long. Daddy long legs live in many places around the world. You might see one in your house, in the garage, or outside in the garden.

questions.question: How many legs does a daddy long legs have?
What part of the daddy long legs is very long?
Name a place where you might see a daddy long legs.
If a daddy long legs has eight legs, how many legs do two daddy long legs have together?

hunks.imageAlt: A daddy longlegs spider hangs from a blade of grass.

hunks.text: Daddy long legs are not SPIDERS, even though they look a little bit like spiders. A real spider has two body parts. A daddy long legs has one body part. Spiders make webs to catch food, but daddy long legs do not make webs. Many people think daddy long legs and spiders are the same, but they are different.

questions.question: Are daddy long legs the same as spiders?
What do spiders make to catch food?
Name something different between a spider and a daddy long legs.
questions.answer: SPIDERS MAKE WEBS / DADDY LONG LEGS DOES NOT / SPIDERS HAVE TWO BODY PARTS / DADDY LONG LEGS HAS ONE

questions.question: Pretend you are a daddy long legs walking on your eight long legs. How would you move across the floor?
questions.answer: SLOW AND SHAKY / CAREFUL AND TIPPY / BOUNCY AND LIGHT

hunks.text: Daddy long legs eat very small things. They like to eat dead bugs, dead leaves, and bits of food. Some daddy long legs also eat mold and fungus growing on things. They help clean up the places where they live. Daddy long legs are helpful because they eat things we do not want in our homes.

questions.question: What does a daddy long legs eat?
How do daddy long legs help us?
Name something a daddy long legs might eat.
questions.answer: DEAD BUGS / DEAD LEAVES / MOLD / FOOD

questions.question: If you had a daddy long legs in your room eating little bugs, how would that make you feel?

hunks.imageAlt: a close up of a spider

hunks.text: Those very long LEGS help daddy long legs stay safe. When something scary comes near, the daddy long legs can feel it with its legs. If a predator grabs one leg, the daddy long legs can drop that leg and run away. The leg keeps moving after it drops off, which confuses the predator. This trick helps the daddy long legs ESCAPE and stay alive.

questions.question: What does a dropped leg do?
What can daddy long legs drop to escape from danger?
Name one way daddy long legs use their legs to stay safe.
questions.answer: FEEL DANGER / DROP LEGS / RUN AWAY / CONFUSE PREDATORS

questions.question: What is an animal that might try to eat a daddy long legs?

hunks.imageAlt: a close up of a bug on a leaf

hunks.text: A daddy long legs is very, very SMALL. Its whole body is about the size of a pea or a small marble. Even though the legs are long, the whole animal is light and tiny. You can hold a daddy long legs in your hand without hurting it. It will not hurt you because daddy long legs have no poison and no way to bite hard.

questions.question: How big is a daddy long legs body?
Does a daddy long legs have poison?
Name something about a daddy long legs that is small.
If you see three daddy long legs on your wall, how many tiny animals are there?

hunks.text: Daddy long legs live in cool, damp places. They like to hide under rocks, in leaves, and in dark corners. They do not like bright light, so they come out when it is dark. Daddy long legs sleep during the day and wake up when the sun goes down. You are more likely to find one if you look at NIGHT.

questions.question: When do daddy long legs come out?
What kind of place do daddy long legs like?
Name a place where a daddy long legs might hide.
questions.answer: UNDER ROCKS / IN LEAVES / DARK CORNERS

questions.question: Close your eyes and imagine it is dark outside. You see a daddy long legs crawling on the ground. What do you hear and feel around you?
questions.answer: QUIET / WIND / COOL AIR / DARKNESS / GRASS

hunks.imageAlt: a close up of a grasshopper on a dark background

hunks.text: Baby daddy long legs are called nymphs. Nymphs look just like grown-up daddy long legs, but they are much smaller. Baby daddy long legs hatch from tiny eggs. The mama does not take care of the babies. The nymphs grow bigger and bigger until they become full-grown daddy long legs.

questions.question: What is a baby daddy long legs called?
Do baby daddy long legs look like grown-up ones?
Name something about how a baby daddy long legs starts its life.
questions.answer: HATCHES FROM EGGS / VERY SMALL / MAMA DOES NOT CARE FOR IT

questions.question: If you could watch a baby daddy long legs grow, what would you want to know about it?

hunks.imageAlt: a close up of a bug on a leaf

hunks.text: Daddy long legs live for about one year. They do not live very long, but in that time they eat lots of bugs and help keep places clean. When winter comes and it gets very cold, many daddy long legs die. New ones are born in the spring when it gets warm again. Each year, there are new daddy long legs to find.

questions.question: How long does a daddy long legs live?
When are new daddy long legs born?
Name something daddy long legs do in their year of life.
questions.answer: EAT BUGS / KEEP PLACES CLEAN / HAVE BABIES

questions.question: What season comes after winter?

hunks.imageAlt: a close up of a bug on a leaf
